# PERF-76 positive: db.Create inside a for loop without batching
lang: go
file: PERF-076-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import "gorm.io/gorm"

type User struct {
	gorm.Model
	Name string
}

func BulkInsert(db *gorm.DB, names []string) error {
	for _, n := range names {
		db.Create(&User{Name: n})
	}
	return nil
}
